characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: To Eitan in her Sweetheartz Bratziez commercial. She expresses her annoyance at him looking at other Bratz on Instagram, only for him to reply that he's not her boyfriend and for her to stay away from his workplace! Aloof Dark-Haired Girl: Subverted; although she seems to fit all the characteristics, much of her supposed aloofness comes from the fact that she'svery shy. Ambiguously Brown: Yasmin's real ethnicity seems rather ambiguous compared with that of the other Bratz girls, although her creators have hinted that she is of Hispanic ancestry. Beware the Quiet Ones: Yasmin sees and hides a lot of things beneath her quiet demeanor, not to mention the uncanny amount of perception she has into her surroundings. Brainy Brunette: Yasmin is a brunette that loves literature and is insightful.

characters.name: Yasmin
characters.description: Abhorrent Admirer: To Eitan in her Sweetheartz Bratziez commercial. She expresses her annoyance at him looking at other Bratz on Instagram, only for him to reply that he's not her boyfriend and for her to stay away from his workplace! Aloof Dark-Haired Girl: Subverted; although she seems to fit all the characteristics, much of her supposed aloofness comes from the fact that she'svery shy. Ambiguously Brown: Yasmin's real ethnicity seems rather ambiguous compared with that of the other Bratz girls, although her creators have hinted that she is of Hispanic ancestry. Beware the Quiet Ones: Yasmin sees and hides a lot of things beneath her quiet demeanor, not to mention the uncanny amount of perception she has into her surroundings. Brainy Brunette: Yasmin is a brunette that loves literature and is insightful.

characters.name: Cloe
characters.description: Beware the Nice Ones: Cloe is a sweetheart through and through, but she can and will stand up for herself when she gets wronged, and, unlike Yasmin, isn't a pacifist. Cannot Spit It Out: To Cameron in the animated series. Character Signature Song: While the Bratz tend to sing as a group there have been several occasions where the girls are given their own individual songs -On the Rock Angelz album, Cloe is credited as writing and performing "You Think" and is the main performer on the bonus track "Grow Up".On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "Only You" and "Invincible", the latter of which was first used in the animated series episode "Kidnapped".On the Forever Diamondz album, she's credited as the main singer for "Just Having Some Fun" and "Forever Diamondz". On the Rock Angelz album, Cloe is credited as writing and performing "You Think" and is the main performer on the bonus track "Grow Up". On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "Only You" and "Invincible", the latter of which was first used in the animated series episode "Kidnapped".

characters.name: Jade
characters.description: Asian and Nerdy: She's Asian-American and aFashionistawho excels in subjects like math and science. Character Signature Song: While the Bratz tend to sing as a group there have been several occasions where the girls are given their own individual songs -On the Rock Angelz album, Jade is credited as writing and performing "Lookin' Good" and is the main performer on the bonus tracks "Sparkle & Shine" and "Girls Night Out".On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "When We're All Together" and bonus track "I Won't Stop".On the Forever Diamondz album, she's credited as the main singer for "Unwritten" and bonus track "Hollaback Girls", notably both are cover tracks. On the Rock Angelz album, Jade is credited as writing and performing "Lookin' Good" and is the main performer on the bonus tracks "Sparkle & Shine" and "Girls Night Out". On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "When We're All Together" and bonus track "I Won't Stop". On the Forever Diamondz album, she's credited as the main singer for "Unwritten" and bonus track "Hollaback Girls", notably both are cover tracks.

characters.name: Sasha
characters.description: Bunnies for Cuteness: Her icon is a bunny. Catchphrase: "Scorchin'!" Character Signature Song: While the Bratz tend to sing as a group there have been several occasions where the girls are given their own individual songs -On the Rock Angelz album, Sasha is credited as writing and performing "Who I Am" and is the main performer on the bonus track "Hey (When The Angelz Play)".On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "Make you Wanna Dance", "Rollin'", and "Livin' It Up", the latter of which is often used as background music in the animated series.On the Forever Diamondz album, she's credited as the main singer for "Ooooh Fashion". On the Rock Angelz album, Sasha is credited as writing and performing "Who I Am" and is the main performer on the bonus track "Hey (When The Angelz Play)". On the Genie Magic album, she is credited as the lead singer for "Make you Wanna Dance", "Rollin'", and "Livin' It Up", the latter of which is often used as background music in the animated series.

characters.name: Felicia
characters.description: The Bus Came Back: She disappeared after the 2000s, but was brought back as a primary character in 2020. The Host: Of Talking Bratz, an animated spin-off series onTikTok. Lady of Adventure: She loves to travel and embark on journeys throughout the globe. Nature Lover: She loves camping. Sixth Ranger: She seems to be the on and off again 5th member for the post-2021 marketing, appearing with the main 4 in Marketing and Talking Bratz.

characters.name: Meygan
characters.description: Freaky Fashion, Mild Mind: Her fashion sense is said to be pretty out there, although she's still a relatively down-to-earth, composed individual. My Nayme Is: The more usual spelling is "Megan", but Meygan adds a Y. Sixth Ranger: She was temporarily the 5th main Bratz girl. Those Two Girls: She is most often seen with Dana among all the Bratz girls. Youthful Freckles: Had freckles when she was a child.

characters.name: Dana
characters.description: All Women Love Shoes: And Dana loves them more than all. Bookworm: She's often found reading books whenever she's not on the computer. Brainy Brunette: Perhaps the most intelligent among the Bratz by far. She has several nerdy interests, namely sci-fi novels and films and computers. Cloudcuckoolander: Science-loving Dana wants to open up the first school and shoe store in space. Good with Numbers: She's very good at math.

characters.name: Nevra
characters.description: Academic Athlete: Nevra is very active both socially and academically, and partakes in several sports as well. Alleged Look Alikes: With Fianna, especially in her earliest appearances. The Diva: She isn't a mean character, but fights for what she deserves. Hidden Depths: She's a good martial artist. Informed Attribute: Nevra is abrutally honestAction Girlwho dislikes standing still and beating around the bush.

characters.name: Roxxi
characters.description: Blithe Spirit: Roxxi loves to "spice things up". Character Signature Song: While the Bratz tend to sing as a group there have been several occasions where the girls are given their own individual songs -On the Rock Angelz album, Roxxi is credited as writing and performing "Stand Out" and is the main performer of the lead track "So Good".Despite not featuring in the movie, Roxxi is credited as the lead singer for the bonus track "They Don't Understand Me" on the Genie Magic album. On the Rock Angelz album, Roxxi is credited as writing and performing "Stand Out" and is the main performer of the lead track "So Good". Despite not featuring in the movie, Roxxi is credited as the lead singer for the bonus track "They Don't Understand Me" on the Genie Magic album. Fiery Redhead: She is feisty and rebellious compared with her straight-laced twin sister Phoebe.

characters.name: Phoebe
characters.description: A Friend in Need: She's said to be quite good at giving advice and always willing to comfort a friend in need. Pink Means Feminine: The girly one among the twins, she possesses many pink clothing items and is often seen wearing them. Polar Opposite Twins: Roxxi is the 'spice', and Pheobe is the 'sugar'. Tender Tears: She tends to be pretty sensitive and emotional compared with the other Bratz. We Used to Be Friends:Word of Godsays that she and Kumi are not on speaking terms, considering that she refuses an invite by Bryce to see a movie with him and Kumi in theBratz The Movievideo game and simply replies that "it would just feel awkward".

characters.name: Kumi
characters.description: Alleged Look Alikes: With Jade, to the point where they tend to not appear in lines together. Camera Fiend: Her favorite passion is taking photos. Inconsistent Coloring: Her 'Ooh La La' artwork gives her deep red hair. Lady of Adventure: She loves to travel and has already been to 3 continents at 16. We Used to Be Friends:Word of Godsays that she and Phoebe are not on speaking terms, considering that Phoebe refuses an invite by Bryce to see a movie with him and Kumi in theBratz The Movievideo game and simply replies that "it would just feel awkward".

characters.name: Kiana
characters.description: Badass Native: She's an Afro-Native Cowgirl whose nickname is literally 'Outlaw Diva'. Breakout Character: Although she only appears in two lines as a doll she is often featured on the Bratz Instagram page. True Blue Femininity: Turquoise is important in her outfit.

characters.name: Fianna
characters.description: Alleged Look Alikes: With Nevra, especially in her earliest appearances. Character Signature Song: Despite not featuring in the movie, Fianna is credited as the lead singer for "Que Tal" on the Forever Diamondz album. Performance Artist: She has a talent for both dancing and theater. Proper Lady: Her friends see her as being very graceful, poised, and feminine. Put on a Bus: Back to Brazil at the end ofTrading Faces.

characters.name: Raya
characters.description: Cloud Cuckoolander: She was the comedian of the group. Genki Girl: She's always upbeat and excitable. Sixth Ranger: She was added to the main Bratz lineup for the 2015 reboot and accompanying web series.

characters.name: Byron Powell
characters.description: Heroes Love Dogs: He owns a bulldog named Ozzy. The girls earn his favor after Yasmin finds Ozzy and takes care of him until he can reunite with Byron. Intergenerational Friendship: He has a pretty cordial relationship with the teenage Bratz. Living a Double Life: His day job is as a reality TV host, but he's secretly also a secret agent. No Celebrities Were Harmed: His name and occupation make him a pretty obvious reference toSimon Cowell. Toyless Toyline Character: His presence in the line is confined to the animated films and series.

characters.name: Sharidan Jones
characters.description: Character Signature Song: On the Forever Diamondz album, Sharidan's credited as the main performer for "What's Goin' On" and "Diamond Girls". Country Mouse: She was raised in a rural setting with her parents before being confronted by the Bratz to complete their fashion show. The Fashionista: She often designed her own clothing from a young age and modeled them on scarecrows. Sesquipedalian Smith: SharidanJones. She Cleans Up Nicely: As seen after she learns to be more confident in her appearance with the help of the Bratz.

characters.name: Katia Eziz
characters.description: As Long as It Sounds Foreign: She is portrayed as being Moroccan in one the newer Bratz films, but she has a Russian name. Brought Down to Normal: After her bottle is broken at the end ofGenie Magic, all the wishes she'd granted became undone and she becomes a normal girl. Cursed with Awesome: She has the ability to grant wishes, and Kon explains that its amazing power is the only reason people are attracted to her. Daddy's Girl: She has an overprotective dad, probably because both are genies. Damsel in Distress: Kon and Zell are hunting her down the whole time.

characters.name: Breeana Devlin
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: Her dad calls her and Cymbeline his "princesses". Break the Cutie: She cries in heartbreak after Cymbeline falls into Lina's side as Breeana fears the idea of losing her sister like she previously lost her mother. She gets better after Jade and Sasha comfort her. Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: Cymbeline isn’t her ‘foolish’ sibling per say, but she comes off rather irresponsible compared to timid Breeana. Foreshadowing: When Breeana sits on a magnolia tree, she cries and wishes that her mother was still there and a magnolia flower falls on her hands. It turns that the magnolia tree is her mother having been transformed by Lina 10 years ago. It's All My Fault: When Cloe and Yasmin are corrupted by Lina, Breeana briefly blames herself, as they fell in a trap that was intended for her and also by endangering Jade and Sadha for bringing them to the dark pixies' lair, however Jade and Sasha reassure she's their friend too and it wasn't her fault.

characters.name: Cymbeline Devlin
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: Her dad calls her and Breanna his "princesses". Bratty Teenage Daughter: She acts really bristly towards her family, falls asleep in class, and bails on her friends to hang out with Lina. However, it's implied that her bratty behavior is due to Lina's corruptive influence, since she becomes much nicer after the spell is broken. Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: Cymbeline isn’t ‘foolish’, but comes off rather irresponsible compared to timid Breanna. Meaningful Name: Her name means "Sun Lord" in Greek. Royal Brat: She's the eldest daughter of the Pixie King and is a bit of a brat. Once Lina's spell is broken, she becomes more of aPrincess Classic.

characters.name: Cameron
characters.description: Chick Magnet: He garnered the attention of several women throughout the series, namely Kirstie Maxwell and Meredith Dimly inBratz: The Movie, although he only has eyes for Cloe. Crazy Jealous Guy: Whenever Cloe seems to be showing interest in someone throughout the animated series and films. The Dandy: Possibly the most fashion-conscious of the boys. Official Couple: With Cloe in the live action movie and from 2015 onward for the franchise in general. Ship Tease:With Cloe throughout the entire franchise! As of 2015, they've become anOfficial Couple. If there's a piece of media or merchandise that includes Cameron, there's almost certainly ship tease for him and Cloe.Deliberately averted in Cloe's Sweetheartz Bratziez commercial where Cameron spends Valentine's Day ignoring Cloe in favour of playing video games.With Roxxi in one of the original series episodes prior to her being established as a lesbian.With Nicole in the Paris movie... until it's revealed she's the villain and he's been hung up on Cloe the whole time!

characters.name: Dylan
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: Tends to be on the receiving end of a lot of slapstick and snark in the animated movies and series. Not that he brings a lot of it on himself, though. Casanova Wannabe: He is always trying to flirt with girls, even the Bratz, only for him to be usually dismissed with "Goodbye, Dylan!". Dumb Jock: He's very athletic and a good skateboarder, but he's the bulb with the lowest watts out of the whole cast. The Friend Nobody Likes: The Bratz often view Dylan as a pest and weirdo for his immaturity and frequent attempts at being a chick magnet (Sasha is the most vocal about it), and even Cameron can get annoyed by him at times. Phrase Catcher: "Goodbye, Dylan!"

characters.name: Bryce
characters.description: Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: Bryce is often portrayed as relatively soft-spoken, gentle, cheerful, and peace-loving. Hidden Depths: He wants to pursue graphic design at an art school in the big city. Lovable Nerd: A somewhat shy and nerdy artist with a significant interest in drawing and anime. "Well Done, Son" Guy: He initially had to persuade his father, who was somewhat skeptical regarding Bryce's dreams, to accept his passion for art, as mentioned inBratz: Genie Magic.

characters.name: Eitan
characters.description: Ambiguously Brown: He’s largely implied to be Asian in the doll line, but in the animated series he uses the same base model as Cameron and Dylan, and has tan skin, making him much more ambiguous. Character Signature Song: Eitan performs the song "The Real You" in the animated series episode "Crush In A Rush", with the song later being included on the Genie Magic album. Implied Love Interest: To Yasmin in the original animated series. Ship Tease: In the original CGI series, Eitan was Yasmin'sImplied Love Interest. This carries over to two of the books, Puppy Love and Total Fashion Makeover, as well as some merchandise.Averted hard in Yasmin's Sweetheartz Bratziez commercial where Eitan treats Yasmin as hisAbhorrent Admirerand explicitly states they aren't a couple. Averted hard in Yasmin's Sweetheartz Bratziez commercial where Eitan treats Yasmin as hisAbhorrent Admirerand explicitly states they aren't a couple.

characters.name: Cade
characters.description: Ambiguously Brown: He has a noticeably darker complexion compared to most of the boys in the line, although his ethnicity is never truly revealed. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Like Koby, he has very few appearances throughout the line and has been excluded from both the series and most of the animated Bratz films. Hidden Depths: He wants to be an actor, according to his bio during a brief appearance in 2011. Rebellious Spirit: Cade mentions that he's somewhat of a rule breaker and tends to be "slick in sticky situations".

characters.name: Koby
characters.description: Camera Fiend: He's continually seen taping everything in sight, often to the point of being an annoyance inBratz: Starrin and Stylin. Characterization Marches On: He was portrayed as being a somewhat socially-awkward movie buff and budding filmmaker inBratz: the Video, yet has beenRetconedinto a laidback, smooth-talking adventurer who hopes to become a police officer, as of a brief appearance in 2011. Chuck Cunningham Syndrome: Despite being one of the four original boys introduced into the series, Koby appears significantly less than the others and has also been excluded from the animated series and films for unknown reasons. Flat Character: Possibly the boy who's received the least character development in the franchise by far. One-Shot Character: He appeared inBratz: Starrin and Stylin, and hasn't been seen or heard of since.

characters.name: Burdine Maxwell
characters.description: Bad Boss: Burdine is the egotistical, fiery-tempered boss of Your Thing magazine. Not only does she explicitly not pay the Tweevils for their work, but she's not above physically abusing them when she's angry. Big Bad: At least to the Bratz. Catchphrase: "Mother of pink!" and "Chop chop!" Freudian Excuse: The series Video Game Starz reveals that Burdine used to be just like the Bratz Rock Angelz, dressing just like them and getting accepted into music school. Feeling forced to be just like her mother leads her to give up her love of rock and enter fashion school instead, later starting Your Thing magazine. It's All About Me: She believes Your Thing can be the only magazine the public will read, and would occasionally come up with nasty schemes to sabotage the Bratz’ public reputation, even using the Tweevils to steal their ideas.

characters.name: The Tweevils
characters.description: Alpha Bitch: They have no shame in partaking mischievous deeds against the Bratz and share their boss' egotistical attitude. Always Identical Twins: Basically have no differences appearance-wise, except for Kaycee's bandaged nose. Catchphrase:"Um, yeah!""My nose!" for Kaycee. "My nose!" for Kaycee. Co-Dragons: They are often these to Burdine Maxwell when working for her, to spy on the Bratz and outsmart them.

characters.name: LinaMcKnight
characters.description: Ambiguously Related: To Breeana and Cymbeline. She calls herself "Auntie Lina" when addressing Cymbeline, although it's unclear if this indicates an actual familial connection or if its just a nickname she gave herself. Animorphism: She has the ability to turn herself into a crow to spy on others. Big Bad: OfFashion Pixiez. The Chessmaster: She corrupts Cymbeline to her side and attempted to do the same to Breeana by using Dylan, whom she knows Breeana has a crush on to lure her in a trap, all to get their father King Melvino to surrender his crown to her, only failing because Cloe and Yasmin fell in her trap instead. The Corrupter: She has the power to turn anyone into her servant by hypnotizing them with her magic. She corrupted Cymbeline to her side by gifting her wings before her 18th birthday, and seduced Dylan through her charms and the Pixie Circle song. She later does the same to Cloe and Yasmin when they try to rescue Dylan. Also tried to do this to Breeana by offering her to have wings as well. However, she refuses.

characters.name: Nita and Nora
characters.description: Coordinated Clothes: Nita, theHot-Bloodedone among the twins always wears bright red outfits to correspond with her personality, while Nora, the milder, girlier twin wears the same outfits in light pink. The Cutie: Sweet, timid little Nora. Expy: Of Phoebe and Roxxi inBratz Babyz: The Movie. Extreme Doormat: Nora, theshyone among the twins who ultimatelyTakes a Level in Badasstowards the end of the movie, once she stands up toDuane. Hair-Trigger Temper: Nita, the feisty one among the twins.

characters.name: Ginger
characters.description: Dead All Along: Turns out her house was long-abandoned, and it's all-but-outright-stated the Bratz were hanging out with a ghost the whole time thatmay or may not have just cursed their neighborhood. One-Shot Character: Only ever appeared inBratz Kidz: Sleepover Adventure. Shrinking Violet: Very nervous and the most scared by the stories the Bratz Kidz tell. Toyless Toyline Character: Of course,there's a valid reason for that...
